curation_notes: Re-curation with improved hints. Patch commit ec42383 modified 2 source files (no test files). Both files had the same fix: adding documentBuilderFactory.setFeature("http://apache.org/xml/features/disallow-doctype-decl", true) to prevent XXE. In SignResponseVerifier.java, the DOM parsing was moved before JAXB unmarshalling so the secure DocumentBuilder validates the XML first. In DigitalSignatureServiceMetadata.java, the constructor was changed to parse metadata through a secure DocumentBuilder before passing to JAXB. Locations derived directly from the patch diff and confirmed by the advisory description which names the checkSignResponse function. L1/L3 areas and L2/L3 descriptions were differentiated: L1 is broader (XML message processing layer), L3 narrows to response verification and metadata parsing specifically.
